scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "cross-env PORT=3099 yarn workspace @app/backend start:dev" "cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3099/api/v1 NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:3099 yarn workspace @app/frontend dev"
scripts.dev:frontend:proxy: cross-env BACKEND_INTERNAL_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3099 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=/api/v1 NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_ORIGIN= yarn workspace @app/frontend dev
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "yarn workspace @app/backend start" "yarn workspace @app/frontend start"
scripts.dev:public: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "cross-env PORT=3099 yarn workspace @app/backend start:dev" "yarn dev:frontend:proxy"
scripts.public:frontend:start: cross-env BACKEND_INTERNAL_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3099 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=/api/v1 NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_ORIGIN= yarn workspace @app/frontend start -p 3000
scripts.public:start: yarn public:build && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "cross-env PORT=3099 yarn workspace @app/backend start:dev" "yarn public:frontend:start"
scripts.ngrok:config: docker compose -f docker-compose.ngrok.yml --profile config up -d ngrok-config
scripts.ngrok:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.ngrok.yml logs -f --tail=200 ngrok-http ngrok-config
